creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
When pressing the "lock screen" button. The screen lock fine. When
trying to unlock, KDE apparently can't verify the passwd, and 
getting back on becomes impossible. Killing the screensaver
doesn't help much, since some security thing throws you out.

How-To-Repeat: Login to kde.
Press the lock button in the panel.
Try to unlock with your passwd.
